title: SOCIAL SERVICES - 211info
text: ST VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIETY SOCIAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a thrift shop, household goods, bus passes for doctor appointments (no Greyhound tickets), prescription assistance, utility assistance (electric, housing gas, water, and propane), rent payment assistance, sheltering supplies (sleeping bags, tarps, and tents) and laundry assistance. Assistance is on a first-come, first-served basis and subject to available funds and amount of services previously given to an individual. Donations accepted. 132 SE H Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 10am-2pm, closed major holidays Email (541) 479-0926 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 476-5137 Main phone Thrift Store (541) 479-0926 Main phone (541) 472-8579 Main phone Community Meals Main phone (541) 479-0926 Main phone (541) 476-5137 Thrift Store Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, paper bills for utility, rent, and prescription assistance AREA SERVED: Josephine County SITE HOURS: Tuesday/Wednesday/Thursday/Friday 10am-4pm Services: Bus Fare Camping Gear Donation Drop Off Points Electric Service Payment Assistance Food Pantries Gas Service Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Household Goods Vouchers Prescription Expense Assistance Rent Payment Assistance Thrift Shops Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - ST VINCENT DE PAUL MOBILE KITCHEN HOT FOOD If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIETY
